title: onoclea crispa
intro: Onoclea crispa, also known as the lobe-leaved lady fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onoclea crispa include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to help reduce fluid retention. Onoclea crispa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
